SecurityHubNotEnabled.^description: AWS Security Hub is not enabled in this region. Security Hub provides a centralized view of security alerts and compliance status across AWS accounts and services, aggregating findings from GuardDuty, Inspector, Macie, IAM Access Analyzer, and other services.

SecurityHubNoStandardsEnabled.^description: No compliance standards are enabled in Security Hub. Standards such as CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark, AWS Foundational Security Best Practices, and PCI DSS provide automated compliance checks against your AWS resources.

SecurityHubStandardsNotReady.^description: Security Hub standards are subscribed but not in READY state. Standards must be READY to actively evaluate controls against your resources. Check for subscription errors or pending enablement.
SecurityHubStandardsNotReady.shortDesc: Resolve Security Hub standards subscription issues

SecurityHubCriticalFindings.^description: There are unresolved CRITICAL severity findings in Security Hub. Critical findings represent the most severe security issues detected by integrated services and should be investigated and remediated immediately.

SecurityHubAutoEnableControlsOff.^description: Auto-enable controls is turned off in Security Hub. When enabled, new controls added to enabled standards are automatically activated, ensuring your compliance coverage stays current without manual intervention.
SecurityHubAutoEnableControlsOff.shortDesc: Enable auto-enable controls in Security Hub
